# Tyrell Components

> Framework-agnostic Web Components library. 21 primitives + tree-shakeable icons. Works in HTML, React, Vue, Svelte, ClojureScript.

The single best entry point for AI agents is the treasure-map index at `guides/AI_GUIDE.md` — it routes to the right guide based on framework and topic.

## Core docs

- [AI map](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/AI_GUIDE.md): Treasure map — pick framework + topic, jump to the right guide
- [Component API](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/TY_GUIDE.md): Universal HTML/JS reference for all 21 components
- [CSS design system](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/CSS_GUIDE.md): Colors, surfaces, text classes, dark mode
- [JavaScript / bundlers](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/js/JAVASCRIPT_GUIDE.md): Subpath imports, side-effects, icon tree-shaking, code splitting, SSR

## Framework guides

- [React](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/js/REACT_TY_GUIDE.md): `tyrell-react` typed wrappers, Next.js App Router, controlled components
- [Vue 3 / Nuxt](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/js/VUE_TY_GUIDE.md): Native usage, `isCustomElement`, `v-model` patterns, SSR
- [Svelte 5 / SvelteKit](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/js/SVELTE_TY_GUIDE.md): Native usage, `bind:value`, `prop:`, SSR
- [Datastar / SSE](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/DATASTAR_TY_GUIDE.md): Server-driven UIs

## ClojureScript

- [ClojureScript substrate](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/clj/CLOJURESCRIPT_GUIDE.md): Distribution, shadow-cljs setup, raw interop, icon tree-shaking — for any CLJS framework or vanilla CLJS
- [Replicant](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/clj/REPLICANT_TY_GUIDE.md): Replicant + Ty integration
- [Routing](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/clj/ROUTING_GUIDE.md): `tyrell.router` client-side routing
- [i18n](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/clj/I18N_GUIDE.md): `tyrell.i18n` translations and locale-aware formatting
- [Layout](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/clj/LAYOUT_GUIDE.md): `tyrell.layout` container-aware breakpoints
- [Building components](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/clj/COMPONENT_GUIDE.md): `tyrell.shim` web component scaffolding
- [Code splitting](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/clj/CODE_SPLITTING.md): shadow-cljs lazy loading

## Building on Ty

- [TyComponent base class](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/js/TYCOMPONENT_GUIDE.md): Architecture for new web components

## Optional

- [Consumer CLAUDE.md snippet](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/guides/CONSUMER_CLAUDE_SNIPPET.md): Drop-in instructions for AI agents in projects that *use* Ty
- [Publishing](https://github.com/gersak/tyrell/blob/master/PUBLISHING.md): Release workflow (only relevant when working on Ty itself)
